task_completion.description: Verify that a group named 'Assembly' is created and contains the boxes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the FreeCAD Tree View (combo view on the left), there should be a folder/group icon named 'Assembly', and 'TopBox' and 'BottomBox' should be nested inside it.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'TopBox' has been moved 50 mm in the positive Z direction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Property View (Data tab) for 'TopBox', the Placement -> Position -> Z value should be exactly -197.00 mm. Alternatively, in the 3D view, there should be a clear vertical gap between the top and bottom boxes.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'TopBox' is colored red with 50% transparency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D view, the upper box appears red and semi-transparent. This can also be verified in the Property View (View tab) for 'TopBox' where 'Shape Color' is red [255, 0, 0] and 'Transparency' is 50.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'BottomBox' is colored blue with 0% transparency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D view, the lower box appears solid blue. This can also be verified in the Property View (View tab) for 'BottomBox' where 'Shape Color' is blue [0, 0, 255] and 'Transparency' is 0.

task_completion.description: Verify the result is saved to 'exploded_assembly.FCStd'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title or the active document tab at the bottom/top of the 3D view displays 'exploded_assembly'. Alternatively, a 'Save As' dialog or terminal confirms the file was saved to the correct path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the FreeCAD GUI to perform the modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the FreeCAD Tree View, Property View, and menus, rather than just executing a single Python script in the background.

integrity.description: Verify the 3D viewport genuinely reflects the requested changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D view must show the boxes changing color, transparency, and position over the course of the trajectory, proving the properties were actually applied to the models.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just rename the file using terminal commands without making the internal changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD interface should be visible with the modified document (Assembly group, colors, displacement) before or during the save operation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial Z position of TopBox is -247.0 mm. After a +50 mm displacement, its Z position in the Data properties must be exactly -197.0 mm. TopBox must be Red (R=255, G=0, B=0) with 50% transparency. BottomBox must be Blue (R=0, G=0, B=255) with 0% transparency. Both objects must be nested under a new group named 'Assembly'. The final output file must be named 'exploded_assembly.FCStd'.
